message: When I think about Kristy, I really think the best thing is for Gai to be by her side.
Gai is back from his trip.
It's a mystery who he went with.
While hoping he returns, I visited Gai's home.
Gai was still out. When is he coming back from his trip?
But standing here won’t make Gai return, so I decided to go somewhere else.
I came to Gai's home, heading to the apartment while hoping he was back.
Hehe, you always look so tasty.
What are you doing here again?
Honestly, I just happened to pass by, but you probably won't believe that anyway.
Oh, Gai? He surely isn't back yet.
That's a secret. But I don't think he'll be back for at least another month. That's how it seems right now.
Wait a minute. You know something, don't you?
Oh no, I've said too much! Well, I have to hurry!
